task_params.title: VFD Cooling Tower Fan Energy-Saving Idea
task_params.content_brief: Short memo capturing an energy-saving idea from shift observations
memo_points: Observed fan running at full speed during lower load periods
Idea: add VFD control to cooling tower fan motor
Expected benefit: reduce unnecessary power draw
Could tie fan speed to condenser temperature or load
Would need controls review and rough cost check
